name: afa-ai-workflow-template
description: Submission template for the AFA 2027 Special Session on Papers Written with Generative AI Workflows. Bundles four submission-tracking skills alongside six Corbis-powered research skills.

interface.shortDescription: AFA 2027 AI workflow submission scaffold and research skills.
interface.longDescription: Packaged form of the AFA 2027 submission template. Points back to the repo's shared .agents/skills/ directory and .mcp.json.
defaultPrompt: Log this AI conversation as a transcript under submission/conversations/.
